title: Supabase-Powered Next.js Application
description: Complete route for building a Next.js App Router application backed by Supabase — covering auth, database with Row Level Security, UI, testing, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Install shadcn/ui component library for accessible UI primitives
Configure ESLint flat config for linting and code quality
Configure Supabase client for server/client/middleware, enable auth with cookie sessions, and set up Row Level Security policies
Set up Vitest for unit and integration testing
Configure CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
Deploy to Vercel with Supabase environment variables configured
